# the coverage heatmaps are generated by unsupervised clustering
# thus, randomness is expected in the visualization
# even if you dont get the exact same picture as presented in our supplementary materials, the data we provide is the same
# this unsupervised clustering led us to the RHD finding

# For thw example tracks of RHD coverage, we used the bam files from samples, in IGV
# we cannot share the BAM slice due to privacy, but the tracks shown in the sup figure are as is from the IGV viewer
